The client cache does not publish exact random-effect multipliers for this enemy. Use the enemy effects guide for the global summary of what is exposed.

Open enemy effects guide

Equipment

  • Ship sprite/base stats: Enemy Aureus Star lvl 82 Enemy Aureus Star lvl 82
  • Engine: Enemy Aureus Still
  • Loot: Alien Alloy, Engine Part, Artifact 100%, Advanced Data Chip, Big Metal Scrap, Crate HOF 25%, Radiated Junk, Polyhedric Fabric, Hydrogen Oscillator, Crate HoF Fulzar 80%, Crate Steel 850 Iridium 225
